delivery_boundary: B0 Workplace Review Alpha before A0 Personal Memory Alpha; provider, mobile, AI, MCP, and theme packages remain later.
design_sequence: After T-B0-P03 is technically accepted with the qualified-code SHA, merge-result SHA, attestation SHA, and exact executable receipt, T-B0-P03-OBS becomes current and observes that same artifact under D1-B. Every Continue, Change, or Stop outcome completes OBS; only Continue makes T-B0-P03D eligible to run design consultation, create DESIGN.md, and complete plan design review. Change advances one bound replacement task, Stop records a structured preservation/support disposition, and T-B0-P04 cannot start before completed P03D. G0 does not create DESIGN.md.

approved_strategy.title: Liaison RM product strategy and Claudia/PingCRM/OKF reconciliation
approved_strategy.scope: Pins OKF v0.1 Draft People authoring, preserves B0 before A0, includes the required OKF People normalization in B0, and excludes general or third-party migrations from B0.

T-B0-P01::UAT-042.rationale: P01 preserves early application-root compatibility with the later P03 fault matrix without claiming UAT-042; T-B0-P03 retains its sole acceptance ownership.

T-B0-P02::UAT-042.rationale: P02 exercises Workspace Session foundations against the later P03 recovery target without claiming UAT-042; T-B0-P03 retains its sole acceptance ownership.

T-B0-P03D::LRM-UX-009.rationale: P03D reviews the future complete B0 journey as a non-blocking design input; T-B0-P11 retains implementation and acceptance ownership.

T-B0-P03D::LRM-UX-012.rationale: P03D reviews the future current-surface primitive contract as a non-blocking design input; T-B0-P04 remains the implementation and acceptance owner.

T-B0-P03D::LRM-UX-016.rationale: P03D reviews the future full-journey theme contract without completing it; T-B0-P11 remains the only implementation and acceptance owner.

T-B0-P03D::UAT-062.rationale: P03D uses the installed full-journey UAT as a non-blocking design target; the UAT stays blocked and owned by T-B0-P11 until B0 implementation.

T-B0-P04::UAT-041.rationale: P04 preserves compatibility with the final installed B0 workflow without claiming UAT-041; T-B0-ACCEPT remains its sole acceptance owner.

T-B0-P06::UAT-041.rationale: P06 keeps Directory scale and projection work compatible with final B0 UAT, but cannot complete or block UAT-041 before T-B0-ACCEPT.

T-B0-P07::UAT-043.rationale: P07 preserves checkpoint behaviour against the later encrypted-recovery workflow without claiming UAT-043; T-B0-P08 retains acceptance ownership.

T-B0-P09::UAT-041.rationale: P09 validates onboarding against the later installed workflow as a non-blocking target; UAT-041 remains exclusively owned by T-B0-ACCEPT.

T-B0-P10::UAT-041.rationale: P10 preserves Event workflow compatibility with the final installed UAT without claiming acceptance; T-B0-ACCEPT remains the sole owner.

T-B0-P11::LRM-PK-006.rationale: P11 prepares installed delivery evidence against the later B0 qualification contract without completing it; T-B0-ACCEPT remains the sole owner.

T-B0-P11::UAT-041.rationale: P11 assembles the installed workflow consumed by UAT-041 without claiming final acceptance; T-B0-ACCEPT remains its sole owner.

T-R4-001::UAT-026.rationale: T-R4-001 establishes provider-neutral grant foundations against a later revocation workflow target; T-R4-002 retains UAT-026 acceptance ownership.

T-R4-001::UAT-034.rationale: T-R4-001 keeps its grant foundation compatible with later provider conformance evidence without claiming UAT-034; T-R4-003 retains ownership.

T-R5-002::LRM-IN-002.rationale: T-R5-002 keeps signal import compatible with later connection acceptance without claiming LRM-IN-002; T-R5-003 retains sole ownership.
